name: Beef Boulette Burgers
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Mushrooms (Use 1 can of mushroom stems and pieces, drained and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 1 can of mushroom stems and pieces, drained and chopped.
2. Mix all the ingredients together.
3. Shape the mixture into 8 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
4. Broil or grill the patties 4-inches from the heat, turning once.
5. Cook until the desired doneness is reached, about 10 to 15 minutes.
